NCT02531438.label: Primary
NCT02531438.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT02531438.text: The primary end point was definitive treatment failure within 1 year after randomization.

NCT01968746.label: Outcome
NCT01968746.text: The factors associated with adequate gestational weight gain were body mass index ≥ 25Kg/m(2) at early pregnancy (AOR = 3.2, 95 % CI 1.6, 6.3); engaging in regular physical exercise (AOR = 2.1, 95 % CI 1.2, 3.6); Antenatal care visit of ≥4 times (AOR = 2.9, 95 % CI 1.7, 5.2); consuming fruit and vegetable (AOR = 2.7, 95 % CI 1.2, 6.6), and meat (AOR = 2.7, 95 % CI 1.1, 97.2).
